function.name: getCurrentLocation
function.description:
Get the student's GPS coordinates. Returns {lat, lng}. Falls back to Kigali
center if unavailable.

function.name: getInsuranceCoverageBlock
function.description:
Look up Britam or Old Mutual
coverage: providerName, networkKey, copayPercent, requiresReferral,
referralNotes, coverageDetails, financialPolicyExcerpt, and limit fields.
Insurance must be 'Britam' or 'Old Mutual'.

function.name: getNearbyHospitals
function.description:
Hospitals within radiusKm of lat/lng; sorted in-network first,
then distance.

function.name: searchHospitalsByCondition
function.description:
Hospitals matching symptom/condition keyword with optional
lat/lng.

function.name: rankHospitalsByPriorityAndCost
function.description:
Rank
by copay (RWF), distance, in-network, emergency unit, rating. Returns
rankedResults with estimatedCopayRwf.

function.name: getClinicInfo
function.description: UR Student Health Clinic (Gikondo) hours, counseling, crisis lines 112/114.

properties.referralNotes:
Inpatient 100% no co-pay schedule at network;
pre-authorisation for elective inpatient care.
properties.coverageDetails:
Inpatient
only; outpatient excluded. Direct billing at partner facilities.
properties.financialPolicyExcerpt:
0% co-pay on inpatient schedule; member/employer pays
above family sub-limits; claims within 90 days; reasonable & customary
charges.

rankedResults.scoreExplanation:
In-network dental clinic but Britam excludes outpatient
services. Outpatient checkups require 100% upfront payment of 20000
RWF.

function.name: getClinicInfo
function.description: UR Student Health Clinic (Gikondo) hours, counseling, crisis lines 112/114.

properties.referralNotes: Corporate/retail tariff; local + EAC + India on referral.
properties.coverageDetails:
Plan-dependent inpatient/outpatient limits; tariff-based
annual premiums.
properties.financialPolicyExcerpt:
Corporate outpatient family
limit 375K–3.75M RWF; inpatient 750K–75M RWF per family; member pays costs above
sub-limits.

rankedResults.scoreExplanation:
Caraes Ndera is in-network for
Old Mutual, specialized in psychiatric care, located 2.5 km away, with a 15%
estimated copay of 2250 RWF.
